title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: aommi/applycling
summary: Drop a job URL, get a complete application package — tailored resume, cover letter, positioning brief, and outreach drafts. Never fabricates. Supports Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, and Ollama. Tracks everything in Notion or SQLite.

title: CodeAndCanvasLabs/Daemora
summary: Open-source AI agent - any LLM, any MCP server, any channel. Self-hosted, autonomous, multi-tenant.

title: Dia1n1a/AI-Summarizer
summary: 🛠️ Summarize text, audio, and video content efficiently with our AI-powered multimodal system for quick, concise insights.

title: eliasepro/groq-pdf-chat
summary: 📄 Chat with PDF files effortlessly using Groq PDF Chat; harness cloud speed and local processing for quick, cost-effective document interaction.

title: Retamoso23/ollixir
summary: 🤖 Enable local large language models with Ollixir, the Elixir client mirroring the ollama-python library for seamless chat, generation, and model management.

title: Toommo2/Text2CAD
summary: 🚀 Convert natural language to real CAD artifacts with Text2CAD, an agent-driven system for deterministic and validated engineering workflows.

title: AsadKhan05/WeChat-AI-Bot-Java-Python
summary: 🤖 Build a local AI chatbot for WeChat using Java, Python, and MySQL, featuring advanced emotional support and complete data privacy.

title: JSONbored/dify-aio
summary: Dify for Unraid, bottled up as an AIO container: agents, RAG, workflows, plugins, sandboxing, Postgres/pgvector, Redis, and sane homelab defaults without the compose-file maze.

title: JSONbored/mem0-aio
summary: Unraid CA template and Docker build for Mem0 (OpenMemory). This mega-container utilizes s6-overlay to seamlessly bundle the pre-compiled Qdrant Vector Database, the Python FastAPI/MCP server, and the Next.js Dashboard UI into a single, click-and-play local AI memory layer. Built for homelabs, privacy, and true agentic AI memory retention.

title: JSONbored/khoj-aio
summary: Beginner-friendly All-in-One Unraid container for Khoj, a self-hosted AI second brain. Bundles the Khoj web app with an internal PostgreSQL database in a single container, while still supporting local or hosted LLMs, external search backends, reverse proxies, and advanced power-user overrides.

title: nugget/thane-ai-agent
summary: Autonomous AI agent for Home Assistant with multi-model routing, persistent memory, and an OpenAI-compatible API

title: SysAdminDoc/FileOrganizer
summary: Hybrid file organizer for Windows: C#/.NET 8/WinUI 3 shell + Python core. Multi-provider AI classification (DeepSeek, GitHub Models, Ollama), six cleanup scanners, progressive hash + perceptual dedup, EXIF photo workflows.

title: Kenzzy69/rag-python-rag
summary: 📄 Simplify document search and Q&A with a complete RAG system, enabling smart retrieval and generation using local LLM models.

title: Clatr0/intent-sentiment-assistant
summary: 🤖 Analyze communication patterns and generate actionable insights for workplace situations with the Intent Sentiment Assistant, prioritizing privacy and efficiency.

title: kayneai/code-auditor
summary: 🔍 Analyze your GitHub repositories with Code Auditor, an AI tool that identifies security vulnerabilities and bugs for better code quality.

title: hexagon-codes/hexclaw-desktop
summary: HexClaw Desktop — 企业级安全个人 AI Agent 桌面客户端。Tauri + Vue 3，本地 Sidecar 零云端依赖，支持 Ollama/OpenAI/Claude/DeepSeek 等多模型，图片视频生成，知识库 RAG，MCP 工具插件，飞书/Telegram/Discord 多平台 IM 接入。

title: Alex8791-cyber/cognithor
summary: Cognithor · Agent OS: Local-first autonomous agent operating system. 19 LLM providers, 18 channels, 145 MCP tools, 6-tier memory, Agent Packs marketplace, zero telemetry. Python 3.12+, Apache 2.0.

title: whatwouldtrishacreate/kage-bunshin
summary: 🥷 Streamline AI development by orchestrating multiple CLI tools in parallel, merging results with git-based conflict resolution for faster, reliable outcomes.
